headline: Broadcom Joins AI Cybersecurity Drive As Valuation And Growth Draw Focus
summary: Broadcom has joined Project Glasswing, an industry wide cybersecurity initiative focused on using advanced AI models to protect critical software infrastructure. The collaboration brings together Broadcom, Amazon, Anthropic, Apple, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia and others to apply AI to vulnerability detection and defensive security tools. The move extends Broadcom's role beyond its core semiconductor and AI chip business into infrastructure software and cybersecurity partnerships. For...

headline: Does Microsoft’s Massive AI Deal And GPU Build‑Out Change The Bull Case For IREN (IREN)?
summary: Iren recently accelerated its shift from Bitcoin mining to AI cloud infrastructure, securing a five‑year US$9.70 billion Microsoft AI data center capacity deal and arranging US$9.30 billion of funding to deploy more than 150,000 Nvidia GPUs across a 4.50 GW power portfolio. This combination of a large, long-term hyperscale contract and substantial capital raising highlights both Iren’s potential to scale AI revenues and the execution and dilution risks that come with such rapid...

headline: A Look At IREN (NasdaqGS:IREN) Valuation After Its Microsoft AI Pivot And Recent Capital Raises
summary: IREN (NasdaqGS:IREN) is back in focus after its pivot toward AI cloud infrastructure, anchored by a five year, multibillion dollar data center capacity deal with Microsoft, raised fresh questions about execution and funding. See our latest analysis for IREN. At a latest share price of $35.74, IREN has a 1 day share price return of 1.74% and a 7 day share price return of 4.26%. However, the 90 day share price return of 18.07% and year to date share price return of 16.30% point to fading short...
